Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust ZURC CONSTRUCTION-GENERAL CONTRACTOR IN PORTLAND,OR to get the job done right.

“ZURC Construction completely transformed our outdated kitchen. The team was professional, communicative, and the quality of the work is outstanding. We especially appreciated their attention to detail and commitment to staying on schedule. We highly recommend them!”

Sarah M. Kitchen Remodel
Mar 15, 2025

“We hired ZURC Construction to finish our basement, and we're very happy with the results. They were able to address the moisture issues and create a functional and comfortable living space. There were a few minor delays, but they communicated effectively and resolved the issues promptly.”

John B. Basement Remodel
Feb 20, 2025

“ZURC Construction did an amazing job remodeling our master bathroom. They helped us design a beautiful and functional space that perfectly meets our needs. The crew was respectful, clean, and efficient. We couldn't be happier!”

Emily K. Bathroom Remodel
Dec 10, 2024

“We hired ZURC Construction to build a new deck in our backyard, and we're thrilled with the results. The deck is beautiful, sturdy, and perfectly designed for entertaining. The team was professional, reliable, and easy to work with.”

David L. Deck Construction
Nov 5, 2024

“ZURC Construction replaced the siding on our house, and it looks fantastic! They were able to match the original style of the house while using modern, durable materials. The project was completed on time and within budget. We would definitely use them again.”

Jessica P. Exterior Remodeling
Oct 22, 2024

“ZURC Construction managed our whole-house remodel with expertise and professionalism. They transformed our outdated home into a modern, functional, and beautiful living space. The team was responsive, communicative, and committed to delivering exceptional results. We highly recommend them for any remodeling project!”

Michael S. Whole House Remodeling
Sep 18, 2024
